title: Figure 2 from: Samarakoon MC, Manawasinghe IS (2026) Additions to the Xylariomycetidae (Sordariomycetes) fungal flora from northern Thailand: four novel Amphisphaeria species. MycoKeys 132: 63-90. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.132.188390
author: Samarakoon, Milan C.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 2 Amphisphaeria longiostiolata (MFLU 26-0120, holotype). a. Substrate; b. Ascomata in dead substrate (ascomata shown with white arrows); c. Horizontal section through ascomata; d. Vertical section through ascoma; e. Peridium; f. Vertical section through ostiolar canal; g. Paraphyses; h–k. Asci; l. Ascus in Melzer's reagent; m–u. Ascospores (m in Indian ink). Scale bars: 1 cm (a); 500 μm (b, c); 100 μm (d); 20 μm (e, f, h–k); 10 μm (g, l–u).
